assertions.text: An audit record is written to docs/arrows/experiments/bidirectional-differential/dedup/DEDUP-001.md
The audit record's Classification field is B-ONLY-DRIFT
The audit record's B-direction section elevates first-occurrence order preservation as an unstated requirement encoded by the code
The audit record's A-direction section shows at least one A-run that uses Set-based (unordered) dedup, illustrating that the EARS permits multiple valid implementations
The Recommended reconciliations section proposes specific updated EARS text that cites order preservation
